payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the latest applicable memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out since it is superseded and no longer considered current.
payload.decision: mem_new was returned for Sam from Goldman because it is the most recent/current memory; mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded and should not be treated as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The request refers to Sam from Goldman, and recall selected the newer memory while filtering the older one because it is superseded.

memory_cards.statement: Sam is associated with Goldman in the current recalled memory.
mem_old is superseded by a newer memory and was therefore excluded from recall as current information.

details: Explained filtering of mem_old as superseded.
Did not promote superseded memory as current.

repair_options: If needed, retain mem_old only as historical context, not as current memory.
Prefer mem_new when answering questions about Sam from Goldman unless a historical view is explicitly requested.
